_comment: Representative food-log fixtures for the FTY-256 local dogfood smoke.
These are the SUBMITTED USER INPUTS the smoke sends to the live local API
plus the outcome the estimator must deliver — they are verification data,
not estimator behavior. Kept as data (not a Python literal) so the smoke
code stays generic: it special-cases nothing and hardcodes no brand phrase,
and the estimator's no-special-case scan (test_exact_snack_phrase_resolution)
keeps holding over backend/app. Calorie bands are plausibility tolerances for
the verification, never a nutrition table the estimator reads.
expected_item_count: exact number of derived items, or null for 'at least one'.
forbid_source_types: source_type values that would be a WRONG resolution.
forbid_substrings: tokens that must not appear in an item name/label/ref.
expected_items: per-item plausibility bands for multi-item fixtures. Each
band's lowercase 'match' substring must locate a derived item (name/label/
ref), and every matched item's calories must sit inside [kcal_low,
kcal_high] — so a bad split cannot hide behind a passing total band.
The 'made-good-oat-bar' fixture (raw_text '...1 serving') also guards FTY-382:
a stated serving is a usable portion, so the entry must reach 'completed' and
never 'needs_clarification' — enforced by the completed-status check for every
fixture (app/ops/food_dogfood_smoke.py _status_failures). FTY-369 owns its
product_database provenance via forbid_source_types; the two assertions ride the
one shared row rather than duplicating the same submitted text.
never_fail (FTY-370/371/372/373): the informal/homemade/consumable never-fail
regression phrases (the 2026-07-16 live-repro banh-mi, the nicorette pair, and
adversarial thrown-together assemblies) only have to reach a terminal non-'failed'
estimate — a rough degraded 'completed' or a 'partially_resolved' passes, terminal
'failed' (an infra/deadline/budget breach surfaced as a failed entry) does not.
Their bands are wide rough-estimate plausibility tolerances (the coarse degrade
prior costs an unresolvable serving at ~200 kcal, so a band must span both a good
live estimate and that rough fallback), never a nutrition table the estimator reads.

fixtures.raw_text: two scrambled eggs and one slice buttered toast
4 toppables brand crackers with 1tbsp of loblaws store brand (PC/presidents choice) dill pickle hummus
tuna salad sandwich on white bread, about 1/2 a can of tuna
made good mornings - chocolate chip organic soft baked oat bars, 1 serving
homemade banh mi on a brioche style bun with shredded carrot, siracha mayo, cucumber, green onion and 3 ground pork meat
a big bowl of the chicken and rice casserole i threw together last night - chicken thighs, rice, cream of mushroom, cheese and frozen peas
some leftover thrown together veggie curry i made - chickpeas, coconut milk, spinach, whatever spices, over a scoop of rice
